subcodes.first_line: Praised be to God hath ever been One Eternally Existent through the Eternality of His own Being, One Ever-Permanent through the Continuance of His Pre-Eternality
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی کان باقیا ببقاء کینونیته و دائما بدوام ازلیته الذی خلق
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @life and death, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @outward and inward meanings, @the concourse on high, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice
